2) Who should be invited? (Please provide email addresses or tell me to invite the same participants as the Project Kick-off or any other existing event.)

3) Event title and short description — I can use:

   If you want different wording, please specify.

4) Location (optional) — e.g., "Office 44A", "Zoom", or leave blank.

Tell me: which alternative time you prefer (or another time that day), who to invite, and whether the default title/description/location are OK. Once you confirm, I’ll create the one-hour event and send invites.
